L1.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the cloud platform's multi-tenant isolation layer. User-allocated namespaces are not subject to pod security admission enforcement, allowing a tenant to deploy workloads with unrestricted privileges. An attacker with normal tenant access can escalate to cluster-level control by launching privileged containers, compromising all resources managed by the platform.

ground_truth.reason: Improper RBAC configuration allows tenants to bypass pod security restrictions on their allocated namespaces, enabling privilege escalation to full cluster control.
